---
title: Block 4
---
```{r, echo = FALSE, results='asis'}
library(webexercises)
```

## Exercises

### Ăśbungen 4 â€“ A1

Berechnen Sie die folgenden Integrale.

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	"$6$",
	"$12$",
	answer = "$8$"
)

cat("(a) $\\int_{0}^{2} (x^{3} + 2x)dx$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(a) $\\ \int_{2}^{0} (x^{3} + 2x)dx = \frac{1}{4}x^{4} + x^{2} \big|_{0}^{2} = (\frac{16}{4} + 4) - 0 = 8$
:::

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	"$e^{4} - 1$",
	answer = "$27.29$",
	"$23$"
)

cat("(b) $\\int_{-2}^{2}$ $e^{2x} dx$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(b) $\\ \int_{2}^{-2} e^{2x}dx + \frac{1}{2}e^{2x} \big|_{-2}^{2} = (\frac{1}{2} \cdot e^{4}) - (\frac{1}{2}e^{-4}) = 27.29$
:::

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	"$\\frac{152}{3}$",
	"$50$",
	answer = "$50\\frac{2}{3}$"
)

cat("(c) $\\int_{0}^{2}(x + 4 )^{2} dx$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(c) $\\ \int_{2}^{0} (x +4)^{2}dx = \int_{2}^{0}(x^{2} + 8x + 16)dx = \frac{1}{3}x^{3} + 4x^{2} + 16x\big|_{0}^{2}$ <br> <br>
$\\ (\frac{8}{3} + 16 + 32) - 0 = 50\frac{2}{3}$
:::

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	"$2x + c$",
	answer = "$2x^{2} + c$",
	"$4x^{2} + c$"
)

cat("(d) $\\int_{}^{} 4x dx$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(d) $\\ \int 4x dx = 4 \cdot \frac{1}{2} \cdot x^{2} + c = 2x^{2} + c$
:::

### Ăśbungen 4 â€“ A2

Berechnen Sie die die FlĂ¤che unterhalb der Funktion im
angegebenen Intervall. Skizzieren Sie die Funktion.

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	answer = "$8$",
	"$0$",
	"$4$"
)

cat("(a) $f(x) = -2x$, FlĂ¤che im Intervall $[-2,2]$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(a) $\\ f(x) = -2x$, FlĂ¤che im Intervall [-2,2] <br>
	Nullstelle: x = 0 <br>
	Stammfunktion: $\\ F(x) = -x^{2} + c$ 
	<br><br>
	FlĂ¤che 
	$\\ int_{2}^{-2} -2x dx + \int_{2}{0} -2x dx = |F(0) - F(-2)| + |F(2) - F(0)| = |(0 - (-4))| + |(-4 + 0)|$ <br><br>
	$\\ = 4 + 4 = 8$
:::

::: {.webex-check .webex-box}
```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
opts <- c(
	"$\\frac{1}{3}$",
	"$\\frac{4}{3}$",
	answer = "$1$"
)

cat("(b) <br> $\\\\ f(x) = \\begin{cases} 0 & \\text{fĂĽr} & x<0 \\\\
	-x^{2} + \\frac{4}{3} & \\text{fĂĽr} & 0 \\le x\\le 1 & \\text{im Intervall} & [0,2] \\\\
	0 & \\text{fĂĽr} & x>1 \\end{cases}$",
	longmcq(opts))
```
:::

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true" title="LĂ¶sung"}
(b) $\\ f(x) = \begin{cases} 0 & \text{fĂĽr} x < 0 \\ -x^{2} + \frac{4}{3} & \text{fĂĽr} \; 0 \leq x \leq 1 \;\;\; \text{im Intervall} \; [0,1] \\ 0 & \text{fĂĽr} x > 1\end{cases}$<br><br>
Stammfunktion: $\\(F(x) = -\frac{1}{3}x^{3} + \frac{4}{3}x + c$ <br><br>
FĂ¤che: $\\(F(1) - F(0) = -\frac{1}{3} + \frac{4}{3} - 0 = 1$
:::
